title: Austria Application for a Passport or Identity Card (Antrag auf Ausstellung eines österreichischen Reisepasses oder Personalausweises)
description: Austria's bilingual German/English combined application for an Austrian passport (regular, additional, or emergency) and/or a national identity card (Personalausweis), used principally through Austrian embassies and consulates abroad. Modelled from the current 2-page fillable-AcroForm PDF specimen hosted in BMEIA's own central 'Allgemein/Formulare' (General Forms) library. Domestically, and at most missions, applicants — including infants — must be personally present when applying (fingerprints are captured live for a passport). This document deliberately does not model: the mission-specific appointment-booking step; the staff-only 'Vorgelegte Nachweise' (evidence presented) checklist and consular-fee tariff table on page 2, both explicitly marked 'Vom Antragsteller nicht auszufüllen' (not to be filled out by the applicant) and carrying no AcroForm widgets of their own; and the separate, dedicated single-page 'Antrag auf Ausstellung eines Personalausweises' form used domestically and by some other missions for identity-card-only applications (already modelled as this registry's at/bmi/national-identity-card-application). GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Republic of Austria, the Bundesministerium für europäische und internationale Angelegenheiten, or any Austrian embassy or consulate.

authority.name: Bundesministerium für europäische und internationale Angelegenheiten (BMEIA), acting through Austria's embassies and consulates abroad; domestic passport/identity-card issuance is administered by the Bundesministerium für Inneres (BMI) through each Land's Passbehörde

source.documentRef: 'Antrag auf Ausstellung eines österreichischen Reisepasses oder Personalausweis' / 'Application for an Austrian passport or identity card', a bilingual German/English 2-page fillable-AcroForm PDF hosted directly in BMEIA's central 'Allgemein/Formulare' forms library

verification.notes: Authored from a fresh curl fetch of the genuine fillable-AcroForm PDF directly from bmeia.gv.at (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 292,446 bytes, SHA-256 a54c77ef3bae9ace86a40bf8dcdfb8887c871eec64cbd16ce50d14bd541dcf56), re-confirmed live a second time before finalizing this record. All 42 AcroForm widgets across the PDF's 2 pages were extracted and enumerated with pdfjs-dist's getAnnotations()/getFieldObjects()/getTextContent(); getFieldObjects() confirms all 42 are distinct, independently-named fields with no shared field names anywhere in the document, and every Btn widget reports radioButton:false — unlike this registry's sibling at/bmi/national-identity-card-application (which has 2 genuine PDF radio-button groups), this specimen contains zero true radio groups. Every multi-option selector on the form (document type; applicant-vs-named-child; gender; existing-passport status; lost-vs-stolen; the 7-option legal-representation basis) is therefore modelled as independent optional boolean fields, with GSP-0013 exclusivityGroups declared wherever real-world mutual exclusivity is evident even though the PDF itself does not enforce it structurally — except the document-type selector (Notpass/weiterer Reisepass/Personalausweis), which is left ungrouped since an applicant may legitimately request more than one document type on a single filing. All 42 widgets map onto 42 fields with zero merges and zero exclusions (unlike prior AT cycles, this specimen's authoring included no stray, duplicate-heading, or footer-reference widgets to exclude). See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, the position-based methodology used to attribute the PDF's several generically-named 'TextN' widgets to their nearest printed label, and the mock conformance test run.

fields.name: applicationForSelf
fields.label: This application is for the adult applicant themselves
fields.description: A checkbox positioned immediately beside the form's own printed title/heading sentence, functioning as the first of two mutually-exclusive 'who is this document for' options (see 'applicationForNamedChild'). Its own PDF tooltip (/TU alternate text) is literally the full document title rather than a distinct short label — disclosed rather than silently rewritten; see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'Antrag auf Ausstellung eines österreichischen Reisepasses oder Personalausweis' (checkbox beside the form's own title line)

fields.name: applicationForNamedChild
fields.label: This application is for the following child
fields.description: Mutually exclusive with 'applicationForSelf' (see exclusivityGroups) — checked when the document holder is a minor child rather than the adult signing the form. When true, the page-2 legal-representative section becomes relevant (see 'legalRepresentativeConsent' in documents[]).
fields.sourceRef: 'Ich beantrage die Ausstellung eines Reisepasses oder Personalausweises für das nachstehende Kind' / 'I am applying for a passport or identity card to be issued for the following child'

fields.name: emergencyPassportRequested
fields.label: Emergency passport requested (Notpass, § 4a)
fields.description: One of three independent, non-grouped PDF checkboxes for document type (confirmed via getFieldObjects(): 3 distinct field names, no shared group, radioButton:false) — left ungrouped since an applicant may legitimately request more than one document type in a single filing (e.g. an emergency passport now and a standing identity-card application); see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'Notpass § 4a / Emergency Passport § 4a'

fields.name: additionalPassportRequested
fields.label: Additional passport requested (weiterer Reisepass)
fields.description: A second, valid-simultaneously passport (e.g. for travel to a country/region that cannot bear a stamp/visa alongside another country's), distinct from a first/replacement passport.
fields.sourceRef: 'weiterer Reisepass / additional Passport'

fields.name: identityCardRequested
fields.label: Identity card requested (Personalausweis)
fields.description: There is no dedicated checkbox on this form for a first-time/regular standard passport request — that (most common) case is represented by leaving all three of these document-type boxes unchecked (relying on the general 'applicationForSelf'/'applicationForNamedChild' toggle above) or, for an identity-card-only request, by checking only this box.
fields.sourceRef: 'Personalausweis / Identity Card'

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Family name / surname
fields.sourceRef: 'Familienname / Surname (max. 33 Zeichen / characters)'

fields.name: academicDegree
fields.label: Academic degree (if entry on the document is desired)
fields.sourceRef: 'akademischer Grad falls Eintragung erwünscht/ Academic degree if entry is desired (max. 33 Zeichen / characters)'

fields.name: surnameAtBirth
fields.label: Family name at time of birth
fields.sourceRef: 'Familienname zur Zeit der Geburt / Surname at time of birth'

fields.name: previousNames
fields.label: Previous names
fields.sourceRef: 'frühere Namen / Previous names'

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First name(s) / given name(s)
fields.sourceRef: 'Vorname(n) / Given names (max. 20 Zeichen / characters)'

fields.name: specialPhysicalCharacteristics
fields.label: Special physical characteristics
fields.sourceRef: 'Besondere Kennzeichen / Special physical characteristics'

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.sourceRef: 'Geburtsdatum / Date of birth'

fields.name: genderFemale
fields.label: Gender: female
fields.description: One of two independent, non-grouped checkbox widgets (PDF field names 'undefined'/'undefined_2' — neither carries its own /TU tooltip; both were attributed to the printed 'Weiblich / Female' and 'Männlich / Male' options by x/y position under the 'Geschlecht / Sex' heading, not by widget name — see VERIFICATION.md). Mutually exclusive with 'genderMale' (see exclusivityGroups); unlike this registry's sibling at/bmi/national-identity-card-application, this pair is not a true PDF radio-button group.
fields.sourceRef: 'Geschlecht / Sex': 'Weiblich / Female' (positional match to the first of two checkboxes)

fields.name: genderMale
fields.label: Gender: male
fields.description: See 'genderFemale'.
fields.sourceRef: 'Geschlecht / Sex': 'Männlich / Male' (positional match to the second of two checkboxes)

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth
fields.sourceRef: 'Ort der Geburt / Place of birth'

fields.name: heightCm
fields.label: Height (cm)
fields.description: A generically-named PDF widget ('Text1', no /TU tooltip) attributed by x/y position to the entry box between the 'Körpergröße / Height' label and the 'cm' unit marker printed just after it — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'Körpergröße / Height' (label) ... 'cm' (unit marker; positional match, widget 'Text1')

fields.name: addressLine1
fields.label: Permanent residence address — line 1
fields.description: The form provides three stacked blank lines under the single heading 'Adresse / Permanent residence:' with no further sub-labels (no separate street/town/country lines) — attributed by position to generically-named widgets 'Text3'/'Text4'/'Text5'; see VERIFICATION.md and 'addressLine2'/'addressLine3'.
fields.sourceRef: 'Adresse / Permanent residence:' (first of three stacked blank lines, widget 'Text3')

fields.name: addressLine2
fields.label: Permanent residence address — line 2
fields.sourceRef: 'Adresse / Permanent residence:' (second of three stacked blank lines, widget 'Text4')

fields.name: addressLine3
fields.label: Permanent residence address — line 3
fields.sourceRef: 'Adresse / Permanent residence:' (third of three stacked blank lines, widget 'Text5')

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Telephone number
fields.description: Generically-named widget 'Text2' attributed by position to the 'TELEFON / PHONE' label; see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'TELEFON / PHONE' (positional match, widget 'Text2')

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: This widget's own PDF field name combines the neighbouring 'TELEFON / PHONE' and 'E-MAIL' labels ('TELEFON  PHONE EMAIL') even though it is positioned only under 'E-MAIL' (confirmed by rect position, immediately right of the 'E-MAIL' label and containing the printed '@' hint character) — disclosed rather than presented as a single contiguous printed phrase; see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'E-MAIL' (label); widget's own internal field name reads 'TELEFON  PHONE EMAIL'

fields.name: hasNoPassportYet
fields.label: I do not have a passport yet
fields.description: Mutually exclusive with 'hasExistingPassport' (see exclusivityGroups) — both are independent, non-grouped checkboxes.
fields.sourceRef: 'Ich besitze noch keinen Reisepass (I do not have a passport yet)'

fields.name: hasExistingPassport
fields.label: I am the holder of an existing Austrian passport
fields.description: When true, the accompanying passport reference fields become relevant: 'existingPassportNumber', 'existingPassportIssuingAuthority', 'existingPassportIssuedOn', 'existingPassportValidUntil'.
fields.sourceRef: 'Ich besitze den Reisepass Nr.' / 'I am the holder of Austrian passport number:'

fields.name: existingPassportNumber
fields.label: Existing passport number
fields.description: Generically-named widget 'Text7', attributed by position to the blank following 'Ich besitze den Reisepass Nr.'; see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'Ich besitze den Reisepass Nr.' (positional match, widget 'Text7')

fields.name: existingPassportIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Existing passport issuing authority
fields.description: Generically-named widget 'Text8', attributed by position to the 'ausgestellt von / issued by' line; see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'ausgestellt von' / 'issued by' (positional match, widget 'Text8')

fields.name: existingPassportIssuedOn
fields.label: Existing passport issue date
fields.description: Generically-named widget 'Text10', attributed by position to the 'ausgestellt am / valid from' line; see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'ausgestellt am' / 'valid from' (positional match, widget 'Text10')

fields.name: existingPassportValidUntil
fields.label: Existing passport expiry date
fields.description: Generically-named widget 'Text9', attributed by position to the 'gültig bis / valid until' line; see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'gültig bis' / 'valid until' (positional match, widget 'Text9')

fields.name: childHasNoPassportYet
fields.label: The child does not have a passport yet
fields.description: Unlike the self branch, the form has no mirrored 'the child already holds passport no. X' checkbox/reference fields — only the negative case is captured for a child; see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'Das Kind besitzt noch keinen Reisepass (The child does not have a passport yet)'

fields.name: previousDocumentWasLostOrStolen
fields.label: A previous passport/identity card was lost or stolen
fields.description: Preamble checkbox to the sentence completed by 'previousDocumentLost'/'previousDocumentStolen'. When true, 'lossOrTheftDetails' becomes relevant.
fields.sourceRef: 'Mein Reisepass (Personalausweis) wurde / My passport (ID card) was'

fields.name: previousDocumentLost
fields.label: ...was lost
fields.description: Mutually exclusive with 'previousDocumentStolen' (see exclusivityGroups).
fields.sourceRef: 'verloren / lost'

fields.name: previousDocumentStolen
fields.label: ...was stolen
fields.description: Mutually exclusive with 'previousDocumentLost' (see exclusivityGroups).
fields.sourceRef: 'gestohlen / stolen'

fields.name: lossOrTheftDetails
fields.label: Details of loss/theft (date, place, circumstances)
fields.sourceRef: 'Angaben zu Verlust/Diebstahl (Datum, Ort, Umstände) / Details of loss/theft (Date, Place, Circumstances):'

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Date of signature
fields.description: The paper form's own signature is a handwritten signature; this field captures only the accompanying date, matching this registry's established convention (see the 'applicantOrRepresentativeSignature' document entry). Signed either by the applicant or, for a minor document holder, by the legal representative.
fields.sourceRef: 'Datum / Date' (adjacent to 'Unterschrift des Antragstellers / Signature of applicant')

fields.name: legalBasisMarriageWithOtherParent
fields.label: Legal representation basis: subsisting marriage with the other parent
fields.description: One of seven independent, non-grouped PDF checkboxes for the legal-representation basis (confirmed via getFieldObjects(): 7 distinct field names, radioButton:false throughout) — grouped via exclusivityGroups since exactly one basis logically applies, even though the PDF does not enforce this structurally. Only relevant when 'applicationForNamedChild' is true.
fields.sourceRef: 'infolge aufrechter Ehe mit dem anderen Elternteil / legal marriage with the other parent'

fields.name: legalBasisBirthMotherCustodySection177
fields.label: Legal representation basis: birth mother entrusted with custody under § 177 Abs 2 ABGB
fields.sourceRef: 'gemäß § 177 Abs 2 ABGB, weil ich als leibliche Mutter gesetzlich mit der Obsorge betraut bin / in accordance with § 177 (2) ABGB, as the birth mother I am legally entrusted with custody'

fields.name: legalBasisGuardianshipCourtDecision
fields.label: Legal representation basis: guardianship-court decision
fields.sourceRef: 'infolge des Beschlusses des Pflegschaftsgerichtes (pflegschaftsbehördliche Genehmigung) / as a result of the decision of a guardianship court (approval by the guardianship authority)'

fields.name: legalBasisOtherParentDeceased
fields.label: Legal representation basis: other parent has died (§ 178 ABGB)
fields.sourceRef: 'gem § 178 ABGB, weil der andere Elternteil gestorben ist / according to § 178 ABGB, because the other parent has died'

fields.name: legalBasisOtherParentWhereaboutsUnknown
fields.label: Legal representation basis: other parent's whereabouts unknown for 6+ months (§ 178 ABGB)
fields.sourceRef: 'gem § 178 ABGB, weil der Aufenthalt des anderen Elternteiles seit mind. 6 Monaten unbekannt ist / according to § 178 ABGB, the residence of the other parent is unknown for at least 6 months'

fields.name: legalBasisGuardianWrittenConsent
fields.label: Legal representation basis: guardian's written consent and presentation of official photo ID
fields.sourceRef: 'laut schriftlicher Zustimmungserklärung des Obsorgeberechtigten und Vorlage dessen amtlichen Lichtbildausweises / according to the written consent of the guardian and presentation of their official photo ID'

fields.name: legalBasisOther
fields.label: Legal representation basis: other (see transcript)
fields.sourceRef: 'Weil ………………………………………………………………. (siehe Niederschrift) / Because ………………………………………………………………. (see transcript)' (checkbox)

fields.name: legalBasisOtherReasonDe
fields.label: Description of the other legal-representation basis (German blank)
fields.description: The bilingual sentence 'Weil ... (siehe Niederschrift) / Because ... (see transcript)' carries two separate blank underlines, one per language, implemented as two distinct PDF widgets ('Text11' for the German 'Weil ___' blank, 'Text12' for the English 'Because ___' blank) rather than one shared field — see VERIFICATION.md and 'legalBasisOtherReasonEn'.
fields.sourceRef: 'Weil ………………………………………………………………. (siehe Niederschrift)' (first blank, widget 'Text11')

fields.name: legalBasisOtherReasonEn
fields.label: Description of the other legal-representation basis (English blank)
fields.sourceRef: 'Because ………………………………………………………………. (see transcript)' (second blank, widget 'Text12')

documents.label: EU-format passport photograph
documents.sourceRef: 'EU-Passbild' ('Bitte das Passbild NICHT zuschneiden. NICHT aufkleben.' / 'Please do not cut / stick photographs.')

documents.label: Signature of the applicant or legal representative
documents.statement: Signed in person at the embassy/consulate, in the presence of a consular official, within the officially marked signature field on the application.
documents.sourceRef: 'Eigenhändige Unterschrift des Dokumenteninhabers/der Dokumenteninhaberin' / 'Bitte erst vor dem Sachbearbeiter/der Sachbearbeiterin unterschreiben' / 'Please sign this application at the Embassy in the presence of a consular official.'

documents.label: Legal representative's (parent/guardian) signed consent
documents.statement: I agree to the processing of the application and the issuance of a passport.
documents.sourceRef: 'Ich stimme der antragsgemäßen Erledigung zu. / I agree to the processing of the application and the issuance of a passport.'; 'Unterschrift des gesetzlichen Vertreters (Eltern). Sie muß vor dem Referenten/der Referentin geleistet werden. / Signature of parent or legal guardian. Must be signed at the Embassy in the presence of a consular official.'
